questions.question: What are the top 5 best-selling genres by total sales?
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT g.Name AS Genre, ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS TotalSales
FROM InvoiceLine il
JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name
ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
LIMIT 5;

questions.question: List all albums by the artist 'AC/DC'.
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT Album.Title AS AlbumTitle
FROM Album
JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId
WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC'
ORDER BY Album.Title;

questions.question: What are the names and email addresses of customers from Brazil?
questions.generated_sql: SELECT FirstName || ' ' || LastName AS Name, Email FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Brazil';

questions.question: What is the most popular media type based on number of tracks?
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT mt.Name AS MediaType, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS TrackCount
FROM Track t
JOIN MediaType mt ON t.MediaTypeId = mt.MediaTypeId
GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId, mt.Name
ORDER BY TrackCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

questions.question: Which employee has the most customers assigned to them?
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName,
       COUNT(c.CustomerId) AS CustomerCount
FROM Employee e
JOIN Customer c ON c.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId
GROUP BY e.EmployeeId
ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

questions.question: How many tracks are there in each playlist?
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT p.Name AS PlaylistName, COUNT(pt.TrackId) AS TrackCount
FROM Playlist p
LEFT JOIN PlaylistTrack pt ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId
GROUP BY p.PlaylistId, p.Name
ORDER BY p.Name;

questions.question: What is the total revenue generated in the year 2021?
What is the average invoice total for each billing country, ordered from highest to lowest?
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT BillingCountry,
       ROUND(AVG(Total), 2) AS AverageTotal
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY BillingCountry
ORDER BY AverageTotal DESC;

questions.question: For each customer, what is their total spending and how does it rank compared to other customers? Show the top 5 customers by spending.
questions.generated_sql:
WITH CustomerSpending AS (
    SELECT
        c.CustomerId,
        c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName,
        ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS TotalSpending
    FROM Customer c
    JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    GROUP BY c.CustomerId
)
SELECT
    CustomerName,
    TotalSpending,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC) AS Rank
FROM CustomerSpending
ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC
LIMIT 5;

questions.question: Which artists have tracks in more than 3 different genres? List the artist name and the number of distinct genres.
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT a.Name AS ArtistName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS GenreCount
FROM Artist a
JOIN Album al ON al.ArtistId = a.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON t.AlbumId = al.AlbumId
WHERE t.GenreId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a.ArtistId, a.Name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3
ORDER BY GenreCount DESC;

questions.question: For each customer, what is their total spending and how does it rank compared to other customers? Show the top 5 customers by spending.
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName,
    ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS TotalSpending,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC) AS SpendingRank
FROM Customer c
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.CustomerId
ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: Which artists have tracks in more than 3 different genres? List the artist name and the number of distinct genres.
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.Name AS GenreName
FROM Artist ar
JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
WHERE ar.Name = 'Iron Maiden'
ORDER BY g.Name;

questions.question: Which artists have tracks in more than 3 different genres? List the artist name and the number of distinct genres.
questions.generated_sql:
SELECT a.Name AS ArtistName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS DistinctGenreCount
FROM Artist a
JOIN Album al ON a.ArtistId = al.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
WHERE t.GenreId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a.ArtistId, a.Name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3
ORDER BY DistinctGenreCount DESC

questions.question: Which artists have tracks in more than 3 different genres? List the artist name and the number of distinct genres.
questions.generated_sql:

    ar.Name AS ArtistName,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS GenreCount
FROM Artist ar
JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
GROUP BY ar.ArtistId, ar.Name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3
ORDER BY GenreCount DESC
